Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,T>,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V,T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
V - the type of validator used by the verifier
T - the type of the value being verified
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractFloatingPointVerifier, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl, BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierImpl, LongVerifierImpl, NumberVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl, ShortVerifierImpl, SizeVerifierImpl
public abstract class AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,T>,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T> implements ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    isMultipleOf(T divisor)
    Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isMultipleOf(T divisor, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isNegative()
    Ensures that the actual value is negative.
    S
    isNotMultipleOf(T divisor)
    Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isNotMultipleOf(T divisor, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isNotNegative()
    Ensures that the actual value is not negative.
    S
    isNotPositive()
    Ensures that the actual value is not positive.
    S
    isNotWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.
    S
    isNotZero()
    Ensures that the actual value is not zero.
    S
    isPositive()
    Ensures that the actual value is positive.
    S
    isWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
    S
    isZero()
    Ensures that the actual value is zero.

  • Method Details

    • isNegative

      public S isNegative()
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleNumberVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value is negative. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Specified by:
      isNegative in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,T>>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • isNotNegative

      public S isNotNegative()
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleNumberVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value is not negative. -0.0 is considered to be equal to zero.
      Specified by:
      isNotNegative in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,T>>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
